use_codes.desc: TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE

indications.text:
AndroGel 1% is indicated for replacement therapy in adult males for conditions associated with a
deficiency or absence of endogenous testosterone:
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to conditions such as
cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing test...
